text.more: This is an interactive sociospatial network visualization of 2,512 people who inject drugs in New Delhi, India. It was created by Steven J. Clipman, a PhD candidate at the Johns Hopkins University.
text.intro:
Sociospatial network of 2,512 people who inject drugs in New Delhi, India

Created by: Steven J. Clipman, MSPH
PhD Candidate at Johns Hopkins University
https://www.github.com/sclipman
text.title: Delhi Sociospatial Injection Network

legend.colorLabel: Blue : Prevalent HCV, Red: Prevalent HIV, Yellow: Prevalent Co-infection, Purple: Spatial Hotspot
